message:
test: Add comprehensive Range request efficiency tests

Add tests to verify HTTP Range requests are being used efficiently when
querying remote Lance datasets:

- LIMIT query efficiency tests (10, 100, 1000 rows)
- Column selection efficiency
- Aggregation efficiency (COUNT, SUM/AVG)
- HTTP 206 partial content verification
- Push-down detection diagnostics

Tests currently log metrics but don't fail, as push-down optimization
needs further investigation. All tests pass but log warnings when
downloads exceed expected thresholds.
